archetype: Performance Pro (Archetype 2) blended with Swiss Brutalist (Archetype 4)

aesthetic_rules.look_and_feel: wenig border-radius, scharfe Cards, technische Linien, Grid-Hintergründe, Automotive / ECU / Dashboard Look, keine Canva-Optik, keine verspielten runden Karten. Harte Linien. Saubere Abstände. Professioneller SaaS-Look.
aesthetic_rules.global_background: Technical grid background applied to the body or main wrapper to fulfill 'Grid-Hintergründe'. Use a subtle SVG grid or CSS linear-gradient with the Hairline color (#232D42).
aesthetic_rules.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Cards should be flat, with 1px solid borders. Do not use soft drop shadows. Use harsh 1px borders to define hierarchy.
aesthetic_rules.radius: Minimal. Use rounded-none (0px) for cards, sections, and major containers. Use rounded-sm (2px) strictly for small interactive elements like inputs, checkboxes, or tiny buttons.

typography.instructions: All major headings (h1, h2) and data-heavy numbers MUST use Rajdhani to give the 'ECU telemetry' look. Body text must use IBM Plex Sans for legibility. Avoid centered text. Left-align almost everything for structural technical feel.

colors.description: User explicitly defined color scheme. MUST use exactly as defined below.

components.button: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary button uses bg-primary (#B4E600) and text-primary-foreground (#080D1A). Hover state should increase brightness or add a 1px border. Secondary buttons use transparent background with a 1px solid border (#232D42).
components.cards: Zero border-radius (rounded-none). Background #0C1220. Border 1px solid #232D42. No drop shadows.
components.inputs: Background #080D1A or #0F1526. Border 1px solid #232D42. Focus ring should be #B4E600 with 0 offset. Use rounded-none or rounded-sm.
components.badges: Sharp rectangular tags. Use uppercase mono font for technical status (e.g., 'APPROVED', 'RISKY').
components.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep stroke width crisp (1.5px or 2px).
components.navigation: Sidebar should have a clear 1px right border (#232D42). Active state for links should use a left-border highlight of #B4E600 instead of a full rounded background.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use tight spacing for the command-center/dashboard feel. Padding inside cards: p-4 or p-6. Gaps between grid items: gap-4 or gap-6. Dashboard should use Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid. High density, fully utilized pixels.
layout_and_spacing.grid: Dashboard must utilize CSS Grid extensively. 'Control Room' mode. Stats row: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5. Main content: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3.

interactions.hover: Hover states must explicitly alter text or border color to maintain contrast. Example: hover:border-primary transition-colors.
interactions.focus: Focus-visible must use ring-1 ring-primary ring-offset-0 ring-offset-background.
interactions.animations: Minimal. No bouncy animations. Fast, snappy transitions (duration 100ms or 150ms) to fit the performance/speed theme.

media.instructions: Use these placeholder images for news feeds, creative editor mockups, and login background.

news_item_1.description: Exhaust system close up for tuning news

creative_editor_background.description: Dark sports car for creative template background

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

page_specific_rules.login: Split screen layout. Left side: dark technical grid background with logo. Right side: login form inside an elevated card (#0F1526) with harsh 1px borders.
page_specific_rules.dashboard: Top row: 5 uniform stat cards (customer count, new news, drafts, approved, published). Below: 2-column layout mapping 'Latest News Feed' and 'Latest Generated Content'.
page_specific_rules.creative_editor: A strict 3-pane layout. Left: Tools/Parameters (customer, template, format). Middle: Large Live Preview canvas with grid background. Right: Properties/Export controls. Resembles a professional IDE or 3D software.
page_specific_rules.customers_list: Table layout with strict lines. No alternating row colors, just a bottom hairline border (#232D42) per row. Hovering a row brightens the background slightly (#0C1220 to #0F1526).
page_specific_rules.content_generator: Form-heavy layout but segmented into logical steps. Use the warning color (#FFB020) for the compliance checks on risky tuning claims.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST configure tailwind.config.js exactly with the hex colors specified under colors.tailwind_vars.
You MUST disable border radiuses across all Shadcn UI components (set --radius to 0 in css, or manually remove rounded classes) to ensure the sharp, no-canva look.
Implement the 'Grid-Hintergründe' by adding a CSS background pattern to the main layout or body tag using linear-gradient and the hairline color #232D42.
Do NOT use Space Grotesk or Inter for headings. Ensure fonts 'Rajdhani' and 'IBM Plex Sans' are imported via Google Fonts in index.html.
Always enforce dark mode by default.
Ensure the compliance warnings use the specified Danger or Warning colors based on severity.
